commands.review_summary:
Adds a `password` option to the PDF tool, threads it through fallback document extraction and the bundled `clawpdf` extractor, rejects it for native PDF providers, and updates docs/tests.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +116, Docs +18. Total +173 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a new feature PR. Source review shows current main lacks the password parameter, and the PR adds unit/mocked coverage rather than a live encrypted-PDF run.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer API approval and contributor real-behavior proof before merge; no narrow automated repair is indicated.

target.title: feat: support encrypted PDF extraction
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a `password` parameter to the PDF tool for encrypted PDFs in extraction fallback mode.
- Thread PDF passwords through the document extraction request, core media wrapper, and `clawpdf`-backed document-extract plugin.
- Reject `password` with native PDF providers, where provider APIs do not expose an OpenClaw password contract.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/media/pdf-extract.test.ts extensions/document-extract/document-extractor.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.helpers.test.ts`
- `pnpm format:docs:check -- docs/tools/pdf.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/document-extract/document-extractor.ts extensions/document-extract/document-extractor.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.test.ts src/media/document-extractors.runtime.ts src/media/pdf-extract.ts src/media/pdf-extract.test.ts src/plugins/document-extractor-types.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed` via Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01ksqx6gret48pm51mp67ypkzy`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: encrypted PDF fallback extraction can receive an exact password string, while native provider mode rejects unsupported password usage clearly.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: Testbox `tbx_01ksqx6gret48pm51mp67ypkzy` exited 0 on rebased branch `b1f2db3ee4`.
Observed result after fix: changed gate passed typecheck, lint, import-cycle, docs, and changed-surface checks.
What was not tested: live encrypted PDF analysis against a real model provider; unit coverage verifies propagation, whitespace preservation, native-provider rejection, and `clawpdf` password-error normalization.
target.author: steipete
